next_unlock_options.rationale: At 86% n=21, closest to mastery; B2 prepositional phrasing (depend on, account for) is the natural depth step
57% n=53 — family-wide focus area, ships alongside §4.3 article batches
66% n=86 — large sample, productive struggle; surfaces only present-tense variants until promotion

recent_observations.author: claude_code
recent_observations.note: Stats sweep: 780 answers / 39 sessions. Question Formation B1 newly identified weak (44%, three 0% items). Irregular verb input still the hardest cluster — irvpp07 0/5. Prepositions/Reported Speech/Adjectives are strengths.

recent_observations.author: claude_code
recent_observations.note: [data] First active session in 4 weeks, 2026-05-06 burst: 86 qids touched, 217 attempts, 44% acc. Profile gaps confirmed and sharpened: irvpp directional (past-simple-for-3rd-form), L1 calques surfacing in mcq decoys (Despite-clause, feel-myself, traffic countability, missing 'the' in 'Most of'). New stuck items added. [inferred] Profile rule 'no irregular-verb input items until accuracy >70%' should be checked — many irv/irvpp 0% items still being served by Smart-mode.

coach_notes.engagement_notes: Player-initiated only per profile. Last active 2026-04-04 (~4 weeks gap). When she returns, brief sessions; no irregular-verb input items until accuracy >70%. K-pop / school context.
weak_patterns: question formation B1 (auxiliary order, do-support) — qf03/qf06/qf07 all 0%

irregular past participle confusion — supplies past simple form when 3rd form requested (spoke/swam/ran/drove/chosed/teched/flied for past participle). irvpp 27% across n=26 in 2026-05-06 burst. Direction is consistent: past simple is lexicalised, 3rd form unstable.

L1 Russian calques surfacing in mcq decoys — 'Despite + clause' (lnk03), reflexive 'feel myself' (fm01), countability slips much/many + traffic (mm03/mm05), 'Most of students' missing 'the' (mp02). 4+ surface forms in 2026-05-06 burst.
